title: Bean's Battle Music
description: A resource/data pack that adds music to cobblemon battles, giving each mon the music from it's origin game.
body:
A work in progress resource/data pack. When the data pack is installed, the resource pack will play battle themes from each Pokemon's origin game. Trainer themes do not need the resource pack installed to play.

This was originally made for a small modpack that some friends and I played, and I decided to keep updating it and upload it here.




# Tracklist

<details>
  <summary>NPC Trainers</summary>

- Battle! (Kanto Trainer) from HeartGold & SoulSilver
- Battle! (Johto Trainer) from HeartGold & SoulSilver
- Battle! (Trainer) from Omega Ruby & Alpha Sapphire
- Battle! (Trainer) from Brilliant Diamond & Shining Pearl
- Battle! (Trainer) from Black & White
- Battle! (Battle Subway) from Black & White
- Battle! (Trainer) from X & Y
- Battle! (Trainer) from Sun & Moon
- Battle! (Battle Royale) from Sun & Moon
- Battle! (Trainer) from Ultra Sun & Ultra Moon
- Battle! (Trainer) from Sword & Shield
- Battle! (Battle Tower) from Sword & Shield
- Battle! (Trainer) from Legends: Arceus
- Battle! (Trainer) from Scarlet & Violet
- Battle! (Blueberry Academy Trainer) from SV: The Indigo Disk DLC
- Battle! (Trainer) from Legends: Z-A
- Battle! (Strong Trainer) from Legends: Z-A
- Battle! (Battle Arena) from Pokemon Champions
</details>


<details>
  <summary>Player Trainers</summary>

- Battle! (Rival) from HeartGold & SoulSilver
- Battle! (Brendan/May) from Omega Ruby & Alpha Sapphire
- Battle! (Rival) from Brilliant Diamond & Shining Pearl
- Battle! (Cheren/Bianca) from Black & White
- Battle! (N) from Black & White
- Battle! (Rival) from Black 2 & White 2
- Battle! (Friend) from x & Y
- Battle! (Hau) from Sun & Moon
- Battle! (Gladion) from Sun & Moon
- Battle! (Hop) from Sword & Shield
- Battle! (Bede) from Sword & Shield
- Battle! (Marnie) from Sword & Shield
- Battle! (Klara) from SwSh: The Isle of Armor DLC
- Battle! (Avery) from SwSh: The Isle of Armor DLC
- Battle! (Nemona) from Scarlet & Violet
- Battle! (Arven) from Scarlet & Violet
- Battle! (Carmie) from SV: The Teal Mask DLC
- Battle! (Kieran) from SV: The Teal Mask DLC
- Battle! (Urbain/Taunie) from Legends: Z-A
- Battle! (Gym Court) from Pokemon Champions
</details>

<details>
  <summary>Pokemon</summary>

  Defaults to Battle! (Wild Pokemon) from Legends: Z-A
  
- Gen 1 - Battle! (Kanto Wild Pokemon) from HeartGold & SoulSilver
  - Alphas use Battle! (Wild Pokemon) from FireRed & LeafGreen
- Gen 2 - Battle! (Johto Wild Pokemon) from HeartGold & SoulSilver
  - Alphas use Battle! (Johto Wild Pokemon) from Crystal
- Gen 3 - Battle! (Wild Pokemon) from Omega Ruby & Alpha Sapphire
  - Alphas use Battle! (Wild Pokemon) from Emerald
- Gen 4 - Battle! (Wild Pokemon) from Brilliant Diamond & Shining Pearl
  - Alphas use Battle! (Wild Pokemon) from Platinum
- Gen 5 - Battle! (Wild Pokemon) from Black & White, Black 2 & White 2
  - Alphas use Battle! (Rare Pokemon) from Black & White
- Gen 6 - Battle! (Wild Pokemon) from X & Y
  - Alphas use Battle! (Alpha Pokemon) from Legends: Z-A
- Gen 7 - Battle! (Wild Pokemon) from Sun & Moon, Ultra Sun & Ultra Moon
  - Alphas use Battle! (Totem Pokemon) from Sun & Moon
- Gen 8 - Battle! (Wild Pokemon) from Sword & Shield
  - Alphas use Battle! (Mustard) from SwSh: The Isle of Armor DLC
- Legends Arceus - Battle! (Wild Pokemon) from Legends Arceus
  - Alphas use Battle! (Alpha Pokemon) from Legends Arceus
- Gen 9 - Battle! (Wild Pokemon) from Scarlet & Violet
  - Alphas use Battle! (Titan Pokemon) from Scarlet & Violet
- Gen 10 - Battle! (Wild Pokemon) from Ultra Sun & Ultra Moon
  - Alphas use Battle! (Totem Pokemon) from Sun & Moon

## Form Changes

- Shadow - Battle! (Cipher Peon) from XD: Gale of Darkness
- Tera-Stellar - Battle! (Tera Raid) from Scarlet & Violet
- Mega - Battle! (Rouge Mega) from Legends: Z-A
- Dmax/Gmax - Battle! (Max Raid) from Sword & Shield
</details>

<details>
  <summary>Legendaries</summary>

- Articuno, Zapdos, Moltres, Mew - Battle! (Wild Pokemon) from Let's Go, Pikachu & Eevee
- Mewtwo - Battle! (Mewtwo) from X & Y
- Raikou - Battle! (Raikou) from HeartGold & SoulSilver
- Entei - Battle! (Entei) from HeartGold & SoulSilver
- Suicune - Battle! (Suicune) from HeartGold & SoulSilver
- Lugia - Battle! (Lugia) from HeartGold & SoulSilver
- Ho-Oh - Battle! (Ho-Oh) from HeartGold & SoulSilver
- Regirock, Regice, Registeel - Battle! (Legendary Giants) from Omega Ruby & Alpha Sapphire
- Kyogre, Groudon, Rayquaza - Battle! (Super-Ancient Pokemon) from Omega Ruby & Alpha Sapphire
- Deoxys - Battle! (Deoxys) from Omega Ruby & Alpha Sapphire
- Uxie, Mesprit, Azelf - Battle! (Lake Guardians) from Brilliant Diamond & Shining Pearl
- Dialga, Palkia - Battle! (Dialga/Palkia) from Brilliant Diamond & Shining Pearl
- Giratina - Battle! (Giratina) from Brilliant Diamond & Shining Pearl
- Arceus - Battle! (Arceus) from Brilliant Diamond & Shining Pearl
- Heatran, Regigigas, Cresselia, Phione, Manaphy, Darkrai, Shaymin - Battle! (Legendary) from Brilliant Diamond & Shining Pearl
- Reshiram - Battle! (Reshiram) from Black & White
- Zekrom - Battle! (Zekrom) from Black & White
- Kyurem - Battle! (Kyurem) from Black & White
- Victini, Cobalion, Terrakion, Virizion, Tornadus, Thundurus, Landorus, Keldeo, Meloetta, Genesect - Battle! (Legendary) from Black & White
- Xernias, Yveltal, Zygarde - Battle! (Xernias/Yveltal) from X & Y
- Tapu Koko, Tapu Lele, Tapu Bulu, Tapu Fini - Battle! (Tapu) from Sun & Moon
- Cosmog, Cosmoem, Solgaleo, Lunala, Necrozma - Battle! (Solgaleo/Lunala) from Sun & Moon
- Ultra Beasts - Battle! (Ultra Beast) from Sun & Moon
- Meltan, Melmetal - Capture! (GO Park) from Let's Go, Pikachu & Eevee
- Zacian, Zamazenta - Battle! (Mysterious Being) from Sword & Shield
- Eternatus - Battle! (Eternatus Phase 1) from Sword & Shield
- Kubfu, Urshifu - Decisive Battle! (Mustard) from SwSh: The Isle of Armor DLC
- Regieleki, Regidrago - Battle! (Legendary Giants) from SwSh: The Isle of Armor DLC
- Glastrier, Spectrier - Battle! (Glastrier/Spectrier) from SwSh: The Crown Tundra DLC
- Calyrex - Battle! (Calyrex) from SwSh: The Crown Tundra DLC
- Enamorus - Battle! (Legendary) from Legends: Arceus
- Wo-Chien, Chien-Pao, Ting-Lu, Chi-Yu - Battle! (Treasures of Ruin) from Scarlet & Violet
- Koraidon, Miraidon - Paradise Protection Protocol Phase 2 from Scarlet & Violet
- Paradox Pokemon - Battle! (Depths of Area Zero) from Scarlet & Violet
- Okidogi, Munkidori, Fezandipiti - Battle! (Loyal Three) from SV: The Teal Mask DLC
- Ogerpon - Battle! (Ogerpon) from SV: The Teal Mask DLC
- Terapagos - Battle! (Terapagos) from SV: The Indigo Disk DLC
- Pecharunt - Battle! (Pecharunt) from SV: The Indigo Disk DLC
- Celebi, Latias, Latios, Jirachi, Diance, Hoopa, Volcanion, Type: Null, Silvally, Magearna, Marshadow, Zeraora, Zarude - Battle! (Ramanas Park) from Brilliant Diamond & Shining Pearl

## Form Changes

- Shadow - Dark Colosseum from Pokken Tournament DX
- Tera-Stellar - Battle! (Tera Raid) from Scarlet & Violet
- Mega - Battle! (Rouge Mega Unleashed) from Legends: Z-A
- Dmax/Gmax - Battle! (Dynamax Adventures) from SwSh: The Crown Tundra DLC
</details>

<details>
  <summary>Specific Forms</summary>

- Galarian Articuno, Galarian Zapdos, Galarian Moltres - Battle! (Galarian Birds) from SwSh: The Crown Tundra DLC
- Shadow Mewtwo - Dark Colosseum (Final Battle) from Pokken Tournament DX
- Shadow Lugia - Battle! (Shadow Lugia) from XD: Gale of Darkness
- Primal Groudon, Meta Groudon, Primal Kyogre - Battle! (Primal Reversion) from Omega Ruby & Alpha Sapphire
- Mega Rayquaza - Battle! (Rouge Mega Rayquaza) from Z-A: Mega Dimension DLC
- Primal Dialga - Dialga's Fight to the Finish from Mystery Dungeon: Explorers of Sky
- Origin Dialga, Origin Palkia - Battle! (Origin Forme) from Legends: Arceus
- Origin Giratina - Battle! (Giratina) from Legends: Arceus
- Mega Darkrai - Battle! (Rogue Mega Darkrai) from Z-A: Mega Dimension DLC
- Black Kyurem, White Kyurem - Battle! (Fused Kyurem) from Black 2 & White 2
- Mega Floette, Ange Floette, Mega Zygarde - Battle! (Hyperrouge Floette) from Legends: Z-A
- Zygarde Core - Battle! (Alpha Pokemon) from Legends: Z-A
- 10% Zygarde - Battle! (10% Zygarde) from Legends: Z-A
- 50% Zygarde - Battle! (50% Zygarde) from Legends: Z-A
- 100% Zygarde - Battle! (Complete Zygarde) from Legends: Z-A
- Dusk Mane Necrozma, Dawn Wings Necrozma - Battle! (Fused Necrozma) from Ultra Sun & Ultra Moon
- Ultra Necrozma - Battle! (Ultra Burst) from Ultra Sun & Ultra Moon
- Crowned Zacian, Crowned Zamazenta - Battle! (Zacian/Zamazenta) from Sword & Shield
- Eternamax Eternatus - Infinite Power from Sword & Shield
- Ice Rider Calyrex, Shadow Rider Calyrex - Battle! (King of Bountiful Harvests) from SwSh: The Crown Tundra DLC
- Stellar Terapagos - Battle! (The Hidden Treasure of Area Zero) from SV: The Indigo Disk

You may need [Shadowed Hearts](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-shadowedhearts), [Lost Lore](https://modrinth.com/mod/poketwo), [Mega Showdown](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-mega-showdown), and [Navas ZA Megas](https://modrinth.com/datapack/navas-zamega) to get all the forms listed.
</details>


<details>
  <summary>Custom</summary>
  
- [Pickmin](https://modrinth.com/datapack/pickmin) use The Forest of Hope from Pikmin 1
  - Alphas use The Forest of Hope (Battle) from Pikmin 1
- [Baby Legends](https://modrinth.com/datapack/baby-legends-cobblemon) use their evolution's theme
- [SpaceWorldMons](https://modrinth.com/datapack/spaceworldmons-cobblemon) use their generation's theme
  - Koma-Inu uses Battle! (Suicune) from HeartGold & SoulSilver
- [Extra Paradox Mons](https://modrinth.com/datapack/extra-paradox-mons) use Battle! (Depths of Area Zero) from Scarlet & Violet
- [Lost Lore](https://modrinth.com/datapack/poketwo)'s MT and MT2 use Pokestar Studios (Battle) from Black 2 & White 2
- [Silent's Minemons](https://modrinth.com/datapack/silents-minemons) use Squid Coast from Minecraft Dungeons
  - Alphas use Clockwork Crafter from Minecraft: Legacy Console Edition
- [Craftemon](https://modrinth.com/datapack/craftemon) uses Squid Coast from Minecraft Dungeons
  - Alphas use Clockwork Crafter from Minecraft: Legacy Console Edition
  - Legendaries use The Arch-Illager from Minecraft Dungeons
- [Roaring Knight Ceruledge](https://modrinth.com/datapack/ceruledge-knight) uses Black Knife from Deltarune Chapter 3
- [Metroids for Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/datapack/metroids-for-cobblemon) use Brinstar from Metroid: Zero Mission
  - Alphas use Brinstar from Super Smash Bros. Melee
- [Thu-Fi-Zer](https://modrinth.com/datapack/cobblemon-thufizer) uses Battle! (Wild Pokemon) from Let's Go, Pikachu & Eevee
</details>

# Special Thanks
- [AndrouDiDou](https://modrinth.com/user/AndrouDiDou) for making the CobbleThemes mod, the same idea as a Fabric mod that works without needing anything server side
- [realDunkin](https://modrinth.com/user/realDunkin) for making the Original Pokemon Battle Music resource pack, and for having intros for most mainline themes
- [MirrorHall_Clay](https://modrinth.com/user/MirrorHall_Clay) for making the Z-A Battle Music resource pack
- [Instrafe](https://modrinth.com/user/Instrafe) for making the Cobblemon Battle Tracks resource/data pack, and for the idea of assigning themes via data pack
- WeatherWorks for scripting help, making it easier to assign themes and form changes to each generation
- BetrayalGames for music selection help and audio trimming
